message.ecclientsettings.action_failed: The client action could not be saved; the previous setting is still active
message.ecclientsettings.hud_editor.save: HUD save failed; your changes remain in the editor.
message.ecclientsettings.profile.recover: %s Profile recovery warning(s) were recorded; see the log for preserved file paths
message.ecclientsettings.profile.stale_d: The active Profile changed; reopen settings before saving
message.ecclientsettings.settings.save_f: Settings could not be saved. Your draft has been kept.
Changes only the brightness you see, without changing brightness settings or potion effects.
option.ecclientsettings.fullbright.stren: Blends from vanilla at 0.0 to the selected local brightness effect at 1.0.
option.ecclientsettings.block_outline.co: Sets the outline's alpha and RGB color without changing its shape, width, reach, or depth behavior.
option.ecclientsettings.block_outline.en: Recolors the vanilla outline of the block you are targeting.
option.ecclientsettings.low_fire.enabled: Moves only the vanilla first-person fire overlay downward.
Recolors only the existing vanilla hurt overlay, including its transparency.
option.ecclientsettings.hit_color.enable: Uses vanilla hurt timing, visibility, and depth rules for every visible hurt entity.
option.ecclientsettings.hud.armor.enable: Shows equipped items and their durability.
option.ecclientsettings.hud.description: HUD settings use the current Profile. Open the visual editor to move, scale, and style widgets.
Open editor (drag / scroll scale / edit style)
Shows the client's current frames per second.
option.ecclientsettings.hud.keystrokes.e: Shows movement, jump, and mouse-button press states with optional CPS.
option.ecclientsettings.hud.left_cps.ena: Shows left-click CPS as an independent HUD widget with its own position, scale, and style.
option.ecclientsettings.hud.ping.enabled: Shows connection latency, or -- when no valid value is available.
option.ecclientsettings.hud.potions.enab: Shows active potion effects, amplifiers, and remaining time.
option.ecclientsettings.hud.right_cps.en: Shows right-click CPS as an independent HUD widget with its own position, scale, and style.
option.ecclientsettings.hud_style.animat: 0.1-2.0 color cycles or switches per second; capped for readability and to avoid rapid flashing.
option.ecclientsettings.hud_style.descri: These options affect only the selected HUD widget. Choose a text mode first, then tune its color and low-frequency RGB animation.
option.ecclientsettings.hud_style.paddin: GUI pixels between widget content and its panel edge.
option.ecclientsettings.hud_style.previe: Fix invalid values to resume preview
option.ecclientsettings.hud_style.rainbo: Controls the hue difference between adjacent characters; used only by Rainbow Wave.
option.ecclientsettings.hud_style.text_c: Fixed mode uses the complete color; RGB modes use its alpha channel.
option.ecclientsettings.hud_style.text_m: Fixed is easiest to read; Rainbow Wave moves across characters; Switch changes the whole line at a low frequency.
option.ecclientsettings.keystrokes.descr: Choose which actions to show and style idle and pressed states independently. The outer panel and idle text color/RGB are in the HUD Style category.
option.ecclientsettings.keystrokes.press: 0 switches immediately; 80-140 ms is recommended for readable clicks without a trailing feel.
Pressed keys use this fixed accent; idle keys use the fixed or RGB mode from HUD Style.
option.ecclientsettings.keystrokes.show_: Counts physical left/right presses in the last second without consuming or changing game input.
option.ecclientsettings.time_changer.cus: Visible day-cycle time from 0 to 23999, used by Custom mode.
option.ecclientsettings.time_changer.mod: Changes only the local sky time and keeps tracking server time for accurate restoration.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.animation_s: Controls smooth transition duration from 1 (slow) to 10 (fast).
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.divisor.too: Base FOV divisor from 1 to 16; larger values zoom in farther.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.enabled.too: Enables the rebindable Zoom action without changing saved camera options.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.max_divisor: Upper zoom limit for scroll adjustment, from the base divisor to 32.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.reduce_sens: Automatically lowers look sensitivity while zoomed and restores it afterward.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.scroll_adju: Use the wheel to adjust zoom; scrolling passes through again at either limit.
option.ecclientsettings.zoom.smooth_came: Temporarily enables smooth turning while zoomed and restores it afterward.
option.ecclientsettings.force_sprint.too: Automatically attempts to sprint while moving forward and still follows vanilla sprint restrictions.
option.ecclientsettings.profile.name: Profile name
option.ecclientsettings.sword_blocking_a: Plays the legacy blocking animation when using a sword. Disabled by default; offhand blocks remain placeable when enabled.
option.ecclientsettings.server_window_fr: Allows the current server to request dark mode or colors for the native title bar. Unsupported platforms safely ignore it.
option.ecclientsettings.server_window_ti: Allows the current server to override the title shown by the game window and taskbar.
Delete Profile '%s'? Its file is preserved as a recovery copy.
screen.ecclientsettings.profiles.title: Profile Management
screen.ecclientsettings.hud_editor.instr: Drag: move / Scroll or +/-: scale / Click: select
Arrows: nudge / Shift: 10 px / Alt: bypass snapping
screen.ecclientsettings.hud_editor.title: Edit HUD Layout
screen.ecclientsettings.hud_style.title: %s Style
screen.ecclientsettings.title: EaseCation Client Settings
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.desc: Hide sensitive content or replace player names in OBS Game Capture while your local view usually stays unchanged. Click Done to apply changes.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.safe: Only OBS Game Capture is supported. Display/Window Capture, screen sharing, and third-party HUDs are not automatically protected; check before every stream.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.summ: Current status
Protection status: %s
Off
Starting
Local path ready; OBS not yet verified
Incorrect launch order
Not supported on this system
Protection failed
Stopped
Active player-name mode: %s
The master switch is currently off.
Enable it, click Done, then follow the 3 pre-stream steps.
After the marker passes, check every selected item individually.
The test marker is off; enable it and check every selected item individually.
Your shader setup may expose player names or world content. Do not stream.
Safe fallback is off. Enable it and reverify before streaming.
Rendering compatibility triggered safe fallback; the local view may change.
Enter a world and check again. Do not stream until protection is ready.
Exit OBS and Minecraft. Enter a world first, then start OBS. Do not stream until you reverify.
This feature cannot protect your current setup. Do not rely on it for streaming.
Stop streaming, restart Minecraft and OBS, then check again.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.save: Saved: protection %s / test marker %s / player names %s
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.conf: The master switch is off; protection is inactive.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.mark: The test marker is off; check every protected item before streaming.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.unsa: Exit OBS and Minecraft. Enter a world first, then start OBS.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.fail: Stop streaming and restart OBS and Minecraft. If it still fails, disable this feature and report it with latest.log.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.iris: This Iris version cannot safely separate world content; safe fallback is active.
A shader pack is active; world content uses safe fallback and may look different locally.
A shader pack is active while safe fallback is off. Player names and world content may leak. Do not stream.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.comp: Ready does not mean the current OBS scene is verified. Recheck after changing mods, shaders, capture sources, scenes, fullscreen, or resolution. Third-party HUDs are not protected automatically.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.setu: 1. Exit OBS. Enter a world, enable protection and the test marker, choose what to protect, then click Done. Confirm the marker is visible locally.
2. Start OBS afterward. Use only Game Capture, disable Capture third-party overlays, and remove any Display/Window Capture source that can see the game.
3. Check Preview and Program item by item. The marker and hidden content must be absent; Hide/Alias must not show real names, and aliases must stay stable.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.enab: Master switch. When off, no streaming privacy protection is active.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.show: The marker must be visible locally and absent from OBS Preview and Program.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.fail: Fail safely when protection is unavailable
Recommended. If safety cannot be confirmed, content is also hidden or aliased locally instead of leaking to the stream.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.comp: Hide coordinates, facing direction, hardware details, and world information from OBS. Enabled by default.
Hide displayed chat messages from OBS.
Hide the input field and text being typed from OBS.
Hide the Tab player list, names, and server information from OBS.
Hide sound subtitles and direction indicators from OBS.
Hide the sidebar scoreboard from OBS.
Hide action bar messages above the hotbar from OBS.
Hide centered titles and subtitles from OBS.
Hide potion and status effect icons from OBS.
Hide the hotbar, health, armor, hunger, experience, and related vanilla HUD from OBS.
Hide this mod's FPS, ping, CPS, keystrokes, and other HUD widgets from OBS.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.play: Only player names are affected; named mobs and armor stands keep their names. Aliases stay stable until you disconnect.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.worl: In-world protection is experimental. Recheck OBS after enabling or changing shaders.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.play: Normal and sneaking player names use the same mode; the local view may change if protection fails.
Alias mode only. Names are easier to follow; codes are more compact.
Alias mode only. Other real-name formatting is never copied.
Also hide player names while a menu is open
Temporarily hide player names and aliases both locally and in OBS.
During safe fallback, aliases may also appear locally or names may be hidden. Check Java/Bedrock and shader/no-shader cases separately.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.worl: World content uses several rendering paths. With Sodium, Iris, or shaders, check the local window, OBS Preview, and Program separately.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.comp: Hide sign and hanging sign text from OBS.
Hide chests in the world from OBS.
Hide item-frame maps from OBS; held maps are not affected.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.scre: Hide selected screens from OBS; open and check each one before streaming.
Includes every vanilla and modded in-game screen.
Hide this screen and its search contents from OBS.
Hide this screen and its commands from OBS.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.cust: For vanilla or modded container screens.
One namespace:path per row; container screens only.
Invalid menu ID; use namespace:path or a valid path.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.auto: While a non-chat screen is open, temporarily hide selected content locally and in OBS. This does not add OBS protection.
Hide while a screen is open: %s
Temporarily hide this content both locally and in OBS.
option.ecclientsettings.obs_overlay.attr: Based on OBS Overlay by zziger (Artem Dzhemesiuk), licensed under MIT.
Opening Profile Management discards unsaved changes. Click Done to save first.
